title: Sophie's Better Tables
description: Revamps loot tables and recipes with various mods and even base Minecraft itself!
body:
This datapack (of which is packaged as a mod), is built to revamp recipes and loot tables for the general modding experience.  Ranging from a chance of bonus stone drops from ores and Shulker Shell drop balancing, to compatibility recipes between Create and Biomes O' Plenty or Clayworks with modded sands and gravels, to dynamic recipes for Supplementaries and Farmer's Delight depending on what mods are installed or items exist!

*This project won't get a whole lot of love from me, as it's mostly just a side thing to put effort toward whenever I get overwealmed by my other projects.*
